rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal, while Educ. Code §7.061 governs school facility safety standards. The two provisions operate in unrelated domains.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt or amend rules as necessary to ensure that facilities standards for new and existing instructional facilities
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed change and this rule.
